title: feat: bind youtube canary records to safe receipts
goal: Bind YouTube canary authorization records to safe audit receipts and authorization bundles using pure model validation, without creating execution, persistence, owner approval, or readiness authority.
rollbackOrStopCondition: Stop without merge if same-head required GitHub checks fail, safe artifacts are unavailable, evidence is stale, receipt hashes are treated as authority, unsafe output appears, or quality gates weaken.
allowedScope: canonical YouTube canary authorization blocker registry
pure record receipt bundle binding evaluator
doneCriteria: canonical blocker-code schema rejects unknown blocker codes
receipt verifier rejects duplicate blockers, non-canonical order, wrong hash, and semantic mismatches
recorded_non_executable records require all opaque references
revoked record metadata is temporally and semantically constrained
record receipt bundle binding recomputes safe hashes
all binding outputs remain forbidden, non-authoritative, non-persistent, and safe

no package, lockfile, workflow, contract, migration, server, route, repository, real network, OAuth, secret, runtime readiness, production readiness, legal compliance, or YouTube policy compliance claim

candidates.summary: pure record/receipt/bundle binding evaluator with canonical blocker registry and receipt verifier

candidates.rejectedReason: storage ownership and access control need a separate threat model first

candidates.summary: treat receipt hashes as sufficient authority
candidates.rejectedReason: safe hashes are correlation identifiers only

bestOfNEvidence.selectionReason: closes the integrity gap without adding routes, persistence, OAuth, network execution, or new authority

changedArea: audit receipt semantic schema and verifier
risks: incomplete committed bundle treated as ready
recorded state claimed with missing references
temporal failure hidden behind revoked or expired status
generic hash binding reason hides mismatch class
coveredSuccessPaths: complete committed bundle binds to recorded non-executable record
preview receipt binds only as non-authoritative
draft, revoked, and expired records map after hashes pass
record created at receipt time is accepted
record created after receipt time is accepted
coveredFailurePaths: record created before receipt time with revoked record
record created before receipt time with expired record
receipt integrity failure before temporal binding
bundle integrity failure before temporal binding
boundaryTests: network, OAuth, secret, real API, record persistence, and receipt persistence remain false

securityBoundaries: Binding is pure model evaluation only.
Safe hashes are correlation identifiers only.
No GitHub approval review is created.
No real YouTube API execution is made.
No route, repository, server, package, lockfile, workflow, contract, or migration file is changed.
productVerificationCommands: corepack pnpm vitest run apps/api/src/youtube-live-chat-canary-record-receipt-binding.test.ts apps/api/src/youtube-live-chat-canary-authorization-record.test.ts apps/api/src/youtube-live-chat-canary-audit-receipt.test.ts apps/api/src/youtube-live-chat-canary-authorization-gate.test.ts: pass; 4 files, 33 passed

npm test: pass; 123 files, 2128 passed, 6 skipped

packageVerification.verification: No package scripts, runtime dependencies, DB driver dependency, Google SDK dependency, package.json, or pnpm-lock changes are introduced.

apiCompatibilitySummary.statement: Adds pure model exports for canary record receipt binding and strengthens existing model schemas. No route, server, repository, or persistence API is changed.

reviewScope.scope: P1 YouTube canary authorization record/receipt/bundle safe model binding.
reviewScope.riskSummary: Main risk is accidentally treating safe hash correlation as owner approval, execution authority, or readiness.
reviewScope.verificationOracle: Focused receipt, record, blocker, and binding tests plus full repo lint, typecheck, tests, evidence, self-protection, and secret scan.

residualRisks: This PR does not persist authorization records or audit receipts.
Storage ownership, access control, replay prevention, retention, deletion, backup, restore, and audit retrieval remain for the next docs-only threat model PR.
This PR does not run a real YouTube canary.
Real credential provider, OAuth execution, network authorization, and YouTube API calls remain future owner-scoped work.
humanConfirmation: AI review is not human approval.
AI review is not GitHub approval review.
This PR does not create owner approval record.
This PR does not create merge authority.
